title: The Guard
author: Zachary Proser
description: A trust-boundary threat model for prompt injection in tool-using agents, with capability scoping, external authorization, and testable security metrics.

blueprint.subject: AGENT SECURITY
blueprint.eyebrow: Trust boundary · Permission matrix · Complete working drawing
blueprint.subtitle: A hostile document becomes dangerous when model context can spend authority that the document never had.
rfiSuggestions: Can a system prompt stop prompt injection?
Where should the trust boundary sit in a tool-using agent?
What can I actually test before shipping an agent?
